product.shortDescription: Just when you thought audio couldn't get any better, the Apple AirPods 4 redefine what it means to experience sound. These iconic earbuds have evolved into a supersonic marvel, offering a completely transformed audio experience that immerses you in theater-like sound. With Personalized Spatial Audio and dynamic head tracking, AirPods 4 create a three-dimensional listening environment, enveloping you in sound whether you're enjoying music, TV shows, movies, or games.Powered by the advanced H2 chip, AirPods 4 deliver a roaring leap in capabilities, enhancing both audio and call quality. These earbuds adapt intelligently to any listening environment, offering features like Voice Isolation, which uses computational audio to minimize background noise and clarify your voice, ensuring superclear call quality even in loud or windy conditions.The new acoustic architecture of AirPods 4 is a testament to Apple's innovation, featuring a low-distortion driver and a custom high dynamic range amplifier. This combination allows you to hear music in exceptional detail, with deeper bass and crystal-clear highs. The Adaptive EQ further personalizes your listening experience by automatically tuning music to your ears, adjusting low and midrange frequencies for rich detail in every song.Stay connected with real-time clarity on FaceTime, thanks to the AAC-ELD speech codec, and enjoy more lifelike Group FaceTime calls with support for Personalized Spatial Audio. Redesigned for comfort, AirPods 4 offer an exceptional fit and all-day comfort with a refined contour and new internal architecture that provides greater stability during movement.The updated stem features a force sensor for easy control of playback and calls with a simple pinch. Rated IP54 for dust, sweat, and water resistance, AirPods 4 and their charging case are built to withstand everything from rain to intense workouts. The streamlined charging case is more than 10 percent smaller than its predecessor, yet it offers up to 30 hours of listening time with the case and up to 5 hours on a single charge.With USB-C charging capabilities, AirPods 4 ensure fast and convenient power-ups. They pair instantly with any device connected to your Apple ID, offering seamless transitions across iPhone, Apple Watch, Apple Vision Pro, iPad, Mac, and Apple TV. The earbuds detect when you remove them, pausing playback until they're back in your ears.Track your AirPods 4 effortlessly with the Find My app, receiving separation alerts if they stray out of Bluetooth range. Siri is always on standby, ready to assist with music, calls, directions, or schedule checks. You can even nod or shake your head to manage notifications without speaking. Share audio easily between two sets of AirPods by bringing them near your iPhone, iPad, or Apple TV for instant connection.Experience the future of sound with Apple AirPods 4, where innovation meets unparalleled audio performance.
product.name: Apple AirPods 4

groups.shortDescription:
AppleCare+ extends your technical support and repair coverage for AirPods, Beats earphones, or Beats headphones to two years from your AppleCare+ purchase date. And it adds coverage for unlimited incidents of accidental damage from handling, each subject to a service fee of $29 plus applicable tax. In addition, you’ll get 24/7 priority access to Apple experts by chat or phone.

Key Features

  • 24/7 priority access to Apple experts by chat or phone
  • Mail-in or carry-in repairs
  • Express Replacement Service
  • Hardware Coverage for your headphones and battery
  • Coverage for unlimited incidents of accidental damage from handling, each subject to a service fee of $29 plus applicable tax
groups.longDescription:
• Unlimited accidental damage repairs
  • Repairs backed by Apple
  • Hardware and battery coverage
  • 24/7 priority technical support

groups.shortDescription:
Protect it today, enjoy it for years.

Get award-winning Allstate service and support that goes above and beyond the manufacturer’s warranty.

General merchandise plans cover:

  • Accidents like drops, cracked screens & liquid damage
  • Breakdowns or failures during normal use including rips, tears & broken zippers
  • Fast repairs & replacements with easy online claims available 24/7
  • Includes 100% parts & labor with no hidden fees

When you add your new item to cart, be sure to add a Walmart Protection Plan, too.

Simply add your plan at checkout. There’s no need to register your plan for it to be active. We’ll email you protection plan details after you check out.

See Terms and Conditions for additional details.
